description: Restores 'Open with Code' to the Windows right-click context menu.

messages.regFile: Creating context menu entry for FILES...
messages.regDir: Creating context menu entry for FOLDERS...
messages.regBg: Creating context menu entry for FOLDER BACKGROUND...
messages.done: All context menu entries created successfully!
messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.scriptDisabled: VS Code context menu fix is disabled in config.
messages.cachedPathInvalid: Cached path no longer valid: {path} -- re-detecting
messages.cacheReadFailed: Could not read resolved cache -- re-detecting
messages.noExeFound: No valid VS Code executable found -- all detection methods failed
messages.completedWithWarnings: Completed with some warnings -- check output above.
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.
messages.checkStart: Quick verification: reading HKCR\\*\\shell, HKCR\\Directory\\shell, HKCR\\Directory\\Background\\shell (read-only)...
messages.repairStart: Repair: ensuring folder + folder-background entries, removing file-target entry, stripping suppression hints, sweeping legacy duplicates.

commands.uninstall: [ADMIN] Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up.
commands.repair: [ADMIN] Make the menu appear on FOLDERS + folder background but NOT on files.
commands.rollback: [ADMIN] Alias for 'uninstall' that also prints the path of the most recent pre-install snapshot for manual reg.exe import.
commands.check: [no-admin] Quick read-only registry check. Reports PASS/MISS for install state AND repair invariants.
commands.smoke: [ADMIN] End-to-end smoke test: runs install then check (folder + file cases). Optional -IncludeFileTargetNegativeCase synthesises HKCR\\*\\shell\\<Name> and asserts check exits 20.
